description: Recto: Note from a certain ʿUzziel. In Judaeo-Arabic. Explaining that the collection of pledges (pesiqa) has been delayed because it was mismanaged from the outset. The sender says he is always trying to expedite it, and he will deal with the matter as soon as he is free. Dating: ca. 12th–13th century. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society 2:544) EMS. Verso: Business accounting in Judaeo-Arabic and in Arabic script. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: פתק מעוזיאל: ביהודית-ערבית — גבית הפסיקה עוכבה בשל ניהול רשלני מראשית. הוא פועל להאיץ אותה. על הגב: חשבון עסקי ביהודית-ערבית וכתב ערבי. כ-המאות ה-12–13.
